bird.name: 鹊鹂
bird.summary: 鹊鹂（学名：Oriolus mellianus）为黄鹂科黄鹂属的鸟类，俗名鹊色黄鹂。分布于泰国、柬埔寨以及中国大陆的广东、广西、四川、云南等地。该物种的模式产地在广东龙头山。 参考文献

relations.subject: 鹊鹂
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest where it is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 鹊鹂
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest where it is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
